extension.summary: Watch (Live) TV and content from Ziggo GO (Netherlands)
Bekijk (Live) TV en content van Ziggo GO (Nederland)
extension.description: Watch (Live) TV and content from Ziggo GO (Netherlands). Subscription required.
Bekijk (Live) TV en content van Ziggo GO (Nederland). Abonnement vereist.
extension.news: v2.0.1 (2026-01-13) - Changed version 1 to have Kodi look and feel - During playing of a channel one can enter numeric keys to switch to another channel - Page up/down can be used to switch to next/previous channel - Channel list now displays information of the current event - Channel overview contains Next item - Home screen has a list of last used channels
v2.0.2 (2026-01-18) - Fixed issues with channel switching
v2.0.3 (2026-01-24) - Fixed issues with different skins, now we always have look and feel of skin.esturary - Fixed issues with recording not playing - Fixed issues with deleting recordings
